3033360.name: Dimension Pirates
3033360.description:
Here is the ultimate, third-person bullet hell game.

Help save the universe and humanity by blasting away a wide array of villains that are trying to take over multiple dimensions.

A highly advanced government agency has found a mysterious portal that leads to strange dimensions, and they need specially trained warriors like yourself to find where this mysterious portal leads.

Sharpen your aiming skills because there's a lot of shooting involved.

Happy Shooting....:)
